mapper.select: SELECT * FROM saf.tn_saf_blnd_mntr WHERE oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND rprt_yr = #{rprtYr}
SELECT * FROM saf.tn_saf_blnd_mntr WHERE rprt_yr = #{rprtYr} ORDER BY oprtr_id
mapper.update: UPDATE saf.tn_saf_blnd_mntr SET total_fuel_qty = #{totalFuelQty}, saf_cert_purch_qty = #{safCertPurchQty}, blnd_ratio = #{blndRatio}, oblg_ratio = #{oblgRatio}, fulfilled_yn = #{fulfilledYn}, last_calc_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND rprt_yr = #{rprtYr}
